items.title: Domino’s reveals new S’mores Lava Cakes with marshmallow filling
items.summary: Domino’s is adding a new dessert to its menu with the launch of S’mores Lava Cakes, giving customers a new take on the classic campfire treat.

items.title: Poland bans “trash streams” with prison sentences for streamers who profit from violence & humiliation
items.summary: Poland has criminalized so-called “trash streaming,” with creators now facing prison time for broadcasting violence, abuse, and humiliation for money.

items.title: Woman hit with $228,000 water bill after inheriting her fathers home
items.summary: A Maryland woman says she was left facing a staggering $228,000 water bill after inheriting her late father’s home.

items.title: Olive Garden responds to scalping concerns as $100 Never-Ending Pasta Pass instantly sells out
items.summary: Olive Garden has responded to concerns about bots and scalpers after all 10,000 of its returning Never-Ending Pasta Passes sold out immediately.

items.title: Browser game challenges you to draw countries from memory and it’s brilliant

items.title: Rare monkey species with bright orange lips discovered

items.summary: A woman has been awarded £10,000 after her photos were used on fake Instagram and Tinder accounts, and she had to deal with people questioning her in public.

items.title: Home Alone 2 star Brenda Fricker dead at 81 years old

items.title: Jurassic Park fans honor Sam Neill with heartfelt in-game dinosaur tribute
items.summary: Following the death of Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, tons of Path of Titans players assembled their best dinosaurs to host an adorable, peaceful migration inside the game.

items.title: Scalpers force Disney store to close after fans queued 12 hours for Lorcana drop
